revision_summary: Four targeted fixes required before production: (1) INTERNAL CONTRADICTION in rep_intent — the 18:03 scope-bridge moment is cited as evidence of 'reactive' intent in rep_intent.evidence but correctly credited as scope-discipline in cherry_pick_moments[3].alternative_hypothesis. Remove it from rep_intent.evidence or reframe it as a delivery-quality gap, not a strategic failure. (2) UNSUPPORTED SPECULATION in cherry_pick_moments[4].alternative_hypothesis — the stair-step comp-tier explanation for Becky's scheduling pivots has zero transcript support. Remove or explicitly label as 'ungrounded hypothesis.' (3) OVERSTATED DOWNSTREAM CLAIM in cherry_pick_moments[0].coaching_implication — 'The closer walks into Friday's call with no emotional anchor' is false; John volunteered three motivations that are in the transcript. Revise to: 'The closer has John's stated motivations (savings, ecology, independence) but no depth — Becky never drew them out, so the closer doesn't know which one is primary.' (4) ADD TWO MISSED CHERRY_PICK MOMENTS: (a) 20:11 — complete absence of 'is that fair' verbal handshake (button_up.is_that_fair_handshake, codex-flagged as show-rate predictive); (b) 01:04 — Becky records '72 as John's ownership date when John said his family owned it since '72 but he personally owned it 'a couple years' — a data-accuracy gap in verify.residence_length. These are distinct protocol gaps not covered elsewhere in the analysis.
